definition: Unwholesome thinking bent toward harming in the MN 19 twofold division.
notes: Use this record when MN 19 or similar contexts classify harmful thinking explicitly. Keep the compound behaviorally concrete and avoid turning it into a vague emotional label or a merely literary cruelty-word.

example_phrases.notes: Third member of the unwholesome class in MN 19.

translation_policy.default_scope: Use for MN 19-style ethical analysis of thinking bent toward harming.
translation_policy.when_not_to_apply: Do not soften the phrase into a merely literary cruelty-word or flatten it into generic negativity when the practical harm-direction matters.
translation_policy.drift_risk: Prevents the compound from losing the concrete practical force of harming.
